title: Soul Knight Weapons
description: A data-pack that aims to add content (mainly weapons) from the game "Soul Knight" into Minecraft.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94d484163fd1948e9d082603d489fd84a5df2cc3.png)
This is the **Soul Knight Weapons**. This datapack aims to recreate weapons (mostly mythical and legendary ones) from the mobile game "Soul Knight". 
Why not play the original game instead of using this datapack? Because these weapons are lowkey hard to obtain 😭

Let's cut to the cool stuff-
# Video Preview

<details>

To awake the mythical weapons, you'll need to create a mythical pedestal (very original, huh).

## As for the Magic Crystals:
- **Magic Fragment Blue**
- 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e75b3473dfb7ecfc6d8f32e773c9e54e5cd357.png)
>   Buried Treasure and Shipwreck Treasure (I forgot the % :skull:) 

- **Magic Fragment Cyan**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9ad3f8ab0a4d5f597ccad9e95576bd338dff27f.png)
>   10% breeze drop and 50% drop from elder guardian

- **Magic Fragment Green**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04ea9f91f01b76bce9c6cb6f9eed5debdf445773.png)
>   33% to drop from sniffer digging 

- **Magic Fragment Obsidian**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fe1cf860a724abf207748d915a7939e457c261b.png)
>   9% drop from Wither Skeleton. 

- **Magic Fragment Orange**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a293eae1dc44e3d24d0dbf97a8e36d719b485ae0.png)
>   archeology drop (both in desert temples and desert wells)

- **Magic Fragment Purple**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad899aa25ee11a2206e547f3687754e91150349b.png)
>   7.5% drop from enderman

- **Magic Fragment Red**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6645ed6f3552b50060eb734e45f3ee076e18c368.png)
>   3% from piglin bartering
</details>


<details>
<summary>Awakening Materials</summary>

# Extra
<details>
<summary>Useful Commands</summary>


```
/function vred:vred_materials
```
Spawns a shulker box with a stack of every custom material

```
/function vred:vred_materials
```
Spawns a shulker box with every weapon

```
/function vred:give/...
```
Complete the command to give yourself either a custom material or a weapon of your choice (depends on how you complete the command

</details>
